name: VITASPRING BIOMEDICAL CO. LTD.
business: VitaSpring Biomedical Co. Ltd. is a development-stage biomedical company focused on research, development, and commercialization of stem cell-based technologies, including X.msc and exosome formulations, for regenerative medicine and wellness. As of the filing, the company has not generated any revenue and does not sell any products for consumer use. Its operations are limited to organizational and preparatory activities with no active research and development expenses.

exposures.sentence: We aim to advance the field of cellular and regenerative medicine through investment in research and development of stem cell based applications and related biomedical innovations.

tamClaims.claim: Regenerative medicine market was estimated at approximately $48 billion in 2025, projected to grow to $58 billion in 2026
tamClaims.sentence: According to publicly available industry reports, the regenerative medicine market was estimated at approximately $48 billion in year 2025 and is projected grow to approximately $58 billion in 2026 to continue to expand at a double-digit compound annual growth rate as clinical adoption increases and regulatory frameworks mature.
